title: Fix API key configuration error for mobile Pocket Option screenshots

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts to add proper API key configuration validation that checks if the Gemini API key is set before allowing analysis requests. Display a clear Portuguese error message 'CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA - Configure a chave da API nas configurações' when the key is missing or invalid.

quotes: erro no print (CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA)

acceptanceCriteria: API key validation function exists in apiConfig.ts
Validation runs before any API request is sent
Portuguese error message 'CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA' displays when key is missing
Error message includes instruction to configure key in settings

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to handle mobile screenshot uploads from Pocket Option broker specifically. Add detection for Pocket Option chart characteristics (dark theme, candlestick layout, broker UI elements visible in screenshot) and ensure the image preprocessing pipeline preserves chart data quality while removing broker interface artifacts.

quotes: deixar print de celular e captura da corretora pocket options ser analisada na analise

acceptanceCriteria: Mobile screenshots from Pocket Option are correctly identified
Image preprocessing handles dark-themed Pocket Option charts
Broker UI elements (balance display, buttons, menus) are filtered or ignored during preprocessing
Chart candlestick data remains intact and readable after preprocessing
Analysis request successfully sends Pocket Option screenshots to Gemini API

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to include enhanced logging for mobile screenshot analysis requests. Log the image source type (mobile camera/screenshot), image dimensions, file size, detected broker interface (if Pocket Option), and preprocessing steps applied. This diagnostic information should help identify why mobile screenshots trigger API key errors.

quotes: enviei demostração de como estou enviando print para o aplicativo fazer analise

acceptanceCriteria: Logging captures mobile screenshot metadata (dimensions, size, format)
Logging identifies if uploaded image is a Pocket Option screenshot
Preprocessing steps are logged in sequence
API request payload details are logged before sending to Gemini
Error logs include enough context to diagnose API key configuration issues

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx to validate API key configuration immediately when analysis begins, before starting the image upload process. If the API key is not configured, display the error message 'CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA' with a button to navigate to Settings, and do not proceed with the analysis stages.

quotes: erro no print (CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA)

acceptanceCriteria: API key validation occurs before 'Carregando imagem' stage
Processing stops immediately if key is missing
Error screen shows 'CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA' message
Navigation button to Settings page is provided
User can configure API key and retry analysis without losing uploaded image

requirements.text: Add a Gemini API key configuration field to the Settings page (frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx). Include a secure text input field labeled 'Chave da API Gemini', a save button, and validation to ensure the key format is correct. Store the API key securely in the backend or encrypted local storage, and update the API service to read from this configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page displays 'Chave da API Gemini' input field
Input field uses password-type masking for security
Save button stores API key in backend or secure local storage
API key format validation prevents invalid keys from being saved
analysisApi.ts reads API key from saved configuration
Settings screen shows confirmation message after successful save

constraints: Do not modify the 6-step technical analysis requirements already defined in apiConfig.ts
Maintain compatibility with existing Gemini Vision API request format
Keep all Portuguese (Brazil) UI text and error messages
Do not change the existing ProcessingScreen stage progression logic
nonGoals: Implementing alternative AI providers beyond Google Gemini Vision
Adding support for other broker platforms besides Pocket Option
Changing the existing analysis result display format
Modifying the chart upload methods (camera, gallery, clipboard, drag-drop)
